allOf.description: Specifies the oldest start or close date and time to return.
Specifies the latest start or close date and time to return.

description: Used to filter the workflow executions in visibility APIs by various time-based rules. Each parameter, if specified, defines a rule that must be satisfied by each returned query result. The parameter values are in the Unix Time format. For example: "oldestDate": 1325376070.
title: ExecutionTimeFilter
